runtime.engine: HeadyOS Runtime (HRT) — TypeScript/Bun core with WASM compilation target
runtime.license: Proprietary — HeadySystems Inc. All rights reserved.
capabilities: CSL gate engine (7 gate types) with real-time state persistence
17-Swarm Matrix agent coordination and task routing
Local model inference via ONNX Runtime, llama.cpp, Whisper.cpp
φ-Scaled task scheduler with mathematically bounded jitter
3D semantic vector memory with pgvector and SQLite backends
OTA update system with blue/green hot-swap and Dilithium2 verification
Cross-platform compilation (Linux x86/ARM, macOS, Windows, WASM, Android, iOS)
Cognitive archetype routing (7 archetypes, 89 bee types)
Multi-model AI provider routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Mistral, local)
MCP server and client support for tool ecosystem integration
Prometheus + OpenTelemetry metrics and distributed tracing
Redis-backed hot-tier memory caching with TTL management
Peer-to-peer agent mesh via WebRTC and gossip protocol
GPIO and IoT sensor pipeline integration (Linux/Raspberry Pi)

dependencies.cloud: Google Cloud Run, Cloudflare Workers, Render

security.enclaveType: Software secure enclave (hardware-backed on Apple Silicon and modern ARM)
